utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. All 7 appear in the final package. Thus all 7 items are included and fully specified per the format, even though the user task also asked for restaurants and emailing contacts, which are outside the required format and thus not counted here.
